prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-MPMSS-4PC-358-BLC Product Type: ART_SUPPLIES Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: 4pc Silver and Gold Metal Purity Karat Marking Stamp Set 14k 22k Gold, 958 999 Silver Description: The 4 piece Gold and Silver Purity Karat Marking Stamp Set is essential for any Jewelry designer, hobbyist or artist. The stamp set is made of hardened stainless steel and is just shy of 4" in length. They come in a small plastic organizer.

The stamp set includes one of each 14k, 22k gold stamp and 958, 999 silver stamp. The stamp marking is approximately 3/64".

This set is ideal for rings, earrings and necklaces as it will not detract from the work and will easily fit in obscure with the help of the bend at the head as seen in the item picture.

This is an important additional to any metal working designers DIY tool kit. Search Terms: jewelers tools purity mark karat gold silver stamp DIY ring necklace jewelry marking crafting tool silver marking stamps Features: - Gold and Silver Marking Stamps: 14K Gold, 22K Gold, 958 Silver, 999 Silver - Color: Black - Length: 3 5/8" - Material: Hardened Stainless Steel === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
